story.title: 增加工具调用与结果的紧凑渲染
story.description: 为 cc_review 工具定义 renderCall/renderResult，使工具模式下默认只显示目标预览、provider、review mode、进度及最终状态，完整报告仍可展开查看。

project_file_index.role: Unit tests for cc_review tool renderCall and renderResult slots, including partial, finished, expanded, and collapsed states.
Core extension file where the cc_review tool is registered with its custom renderCall and renderResult functions.

definition_of_done.description: The cc_review tool's renderCall correctly displays a compact, truncated goal preview along with provider and reviewMode details, never exposing the full goal.
edge_cases: Truncates long goals using previewWidgetText with a cap of 40 characters.
Displays explicit or defaulted provider and reviewMode values in brackets.
Gracefully handles undefined or null args by falling back to safe defaults.

definition_of_done.description: The cc_review tool's renderResult correctly handles streaming/partial progress and distinguishes final states (success, warning, failure, cancelled) in both collapsed and expanded forms.
edge_cases: In partial mode (isPartial=true), extracts and displays the last non-empty line of the current output as the progress message.
In finished mode, accurately maps outcome counts (from meta or regex content fallback) to 'Success', 'Warning', or 'Failed'.
Correctly identifies 'Cancelled' when an abort or cancellation error message is detected.
When expanded=true, appends the full return content below the status header; when expanded=false, only renders the status header.

definition_of_done.description: Robust fallback is guaranteed in headless or non-TUI environments without throwing errors.
edge_cases: If @earendil-works/pi-tui cannot be loaded, renderCall and renderResult return undefined to trigger pi's native raw-text fallback.
No uncaught exceptions are thrown during renderer initialization or rendering in headless environments.
